evals.prompt: Stress test this. [attaches JPMorgan CLX downgrade report PDF]
evals.expected_output: An interactive HTML report with 5 argument sections, Chart.js charts, amber/cyan source attribution, provenance hyperlinks to deepKPI URLs, and a 2-paragraph synthesis. Should identify CLX CIK 21076, use fiscal quarters ending Jun 30, and pull segment-level data before consolidated.
files: /sessions/happy-lucid-noether/mnt/uploads/20260204 - JPMorgan Research - CLX - Downgrade - Clorox NO MOJO DOJO - 10 pages.pdf

evals.prompt: I uploaded a Morgan Stanley note on Chipotle. Can you critically analyze the key arguments and pull actual SEC data to support or challenge them?
evals.expected_output: Should recognize this as a stress-test request even without the exact phrase. Should resolve Chipotle Mexican Grill CIK, pull restaurant-level KPIs (store count, comparable sales, AUV), segment data, and produce the standard HTML report with Revelata branding.

evals.prompt: Stress test this report on SNAP. [attaches analyst report PDF]
evals.expected_output: Should resolve Snap Inc. CIK, recognize the tech/social media context, pull ARPU, DAU, revenue by geography, and ad-related KPIs. HTML report with appropriate charts for user growth and monetization trends.
